The plant is classified as a species within the genus Octarrhena, which consists of several species of orchids. The species Octarrhena montana is further classified into the subfamily Orchidoideae, which includes many terrestrial orchids. The exact classification hierarchy of Octarrhena montana may vary depending on the taxonomic source.
